description: README.md is significantly out of date. Says six tutorial chapters complete (there are 13), roadmap tables show kernel primitives and fc.py features as not-started when most are done, references getting-started/ directory which is actually docs/, and the status section doesn't reflect current project state.

The primitives table stops at the early set (DUP, DROP, SWAP, OVER, +, -, @, !, EMIT, CR, HALT). Missing all primitives added for chapters 6-12: DO, LOOP, I, *, /MOD, KEY, 0BRANCH, BRANCH, =, <>, <, >, 0=, AT. Memory layout also shows an old START address.

summary: forth/tools/README.md shows completed features as not-yet
description: The 'What fc.py does not do' table still lists IF/THEN/LOOP as not yet implemented — they are done. The compilation pipeline description omits DO/LOOP, IF/ELSE/THEN, BEGIN/AGAIN/UNTIL. Uses CLOADM which should be LOADM.
